ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to match suspicion.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: While maintaining consistency, lacks immediate relevance due to lack of contextual response and missed opportunity for persona expression in line with the situation's urgency.
